title: Add iOS platform to Flutter project
description:
Add iOS platform support to the existing android/ Flutter project.

Algorithm:
1. cd android/ && fvm flutter create --platforms ios .
   This adds the ios/ directory to the existing Flutter project.
2. Verify ios/Runner.xcodeproj exists.
3. Create ios/Runner/Info.plist additions for background modes (UIBackgroundModes: fetch, voip).
4. Run fvm flutter analyze to confirm no new Dart issues.
   Note: flutter build ios requires Xcode on macOS; analyze should still pass.

Acceptance: android/ios/ directory created with Runner.xcodeproj; fvm flutter analyze clean.
close_reason: iOS platform added to Flutter project; UIBackgroundModes (fetch/remote-notification/voip) added to Info.plist
